tasks.subject: P3 Task 0: BO nav helper + Products/Orders pages + structural test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** goToSubMenu helper + $menuSelector/$parentMenuSelector props on BackOfficePage; Products & Orders pages (Common + v7/v8/v9 stubs); browser-free structural test.

**Files:** src/Pages/BackOfficePage.php, src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/{Products,Orders}/Page.php, v{7,8,9} stubs, tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php && php -l src/Pages/BackOfficePage.php

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/BackOfficePage.php", "src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Products/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Orders/Page.php", "tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php && php -l src/Pages/BackOfficePage.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["goToSubMenu + props on BackOfficePage", "Products/Orders resolve v7/v8/v9 + declare menu", "composer test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 1: Products & Orders test suites
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two BackOffice suites (login → goTo via menu → assert page title) as executable docs / manual live check.

**Files:** src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Products.php, src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Orders.php

**Verify:** php -l on both suites && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Products.php", "src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Orders.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Products.php && php -l src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Orders.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both suites login+goTo+assert", "php -l clean"]}
```
